_publications._publicationTitle: Selective inhibition of BRAF and CRAF sensitizes NF1-deficient malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors to MEK inhibitors.

_contextSnippet: CRAF knockdown most potently inhibited cell growth, while BRAF knockdown had a moderate effect, and ARAF knockdown had only a subtle impact on cell growth... sh CRAF decreased trametinib GI50 by 54% on average, sh BRAF by 36% and sh ARAF by 10%, compared to sh GFP
details: CRAF knockdown most potently inhibited cell growth, BRAF knockdown had moderate effect, ARAF knockdown had subtle impact. CRAF knockdown decreased trametinib GI50 by 54% on average, BRAF by 36%, ARAF by 10%
